queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default associated with borrowers lacking a formal checking account.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance between 0 and 200 DM.
queries.question: Statistical evaluation of how a minimal checking account balance ranging from zero to two hundred Deutsche Marks influences credit risk drivers and default probability.
Empirical assessment of the risk-mitigating impact of extended loan duration in months on credit risk drivers and determinants of default.
